case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORTION VS. JAMES ELY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORTION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELY, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY ST. #221, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ELY, JAMES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORTION SERVED AUG-09-2002, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT ELY, JAMES
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ELY, JAMES
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS GRANTED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $14.60 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORTION
DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY CCP415.45; FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORTION
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORTION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ELY, JAMES
